# Vue OTP Pro — Complete LLM Reference

> Use this document to generate correct Vue OTP Pro code. All props, events, methods, types, and usage patterns are listed below.

## Installation

```bash
npm install vue-otp-pro
```

## Import

```vue
<script setup lang="ts">
import { OtpInput } from 'vue-otp-pro'
import 'vue-otp-pro/dist/vue-otp-pro.css'
</script>
```

Or register globally:

```ts
import { VueOtpPro } from 'vue-otp-pro'
app.use(VueOtpPro)
```

## Component: <OtpInput>

### Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
|------|------|---------|-------------|
| modelValue | string | '' | v-model binding for the OTP string |
| numInputs | number | 6 | Number of input fields to render |
| inputType | 'number' | 'tel' | 'letter-numeric' | 'password' | 'tel' | Controls character validation |
| inputmode | 'none' | 'text' | 'tel' | 'numeric' | 'decimal' | 'search' | 'numeric' | HTML inputmode for virtual keyboard |
| theme | 'box' | 'underline' | 'rounded' | 'pill' | 'separated' | 'flush' | 'shadow' | 'neon' | 'glass' | 'minimal' | 'filled' | 'box' | Visual theme |
| variant | 'default' | 'primary' | 'success' | 'danger' | 'warning' | 'default' | Color variant |
| size | 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl' | 'md' | Input size |
| placeholder | string | string[] | '' | Placeholder text. String applies to all, array is per-input |
| separator | string | '' | HTML content rendered between inputs |
| shouldAutoFocus | boolean | false | Auto-focus first input on mount |
| shouldFocusOrder | boolean | false | Enforce sequential input order (cannot skip empty fields) |
| disabled | boolean | false | Disable all inputs |
| readonly | boolean | false | Read-only mode (visible, focusable, not editable) |
| error | boolean | false | Error state — triggers CSS shake animation |
| success | boolean | false | Success state — triggers CSS pulse animation |
| inputClasses | string | string[] | '' | CSS classes applied to every input element |
| conditionalClass | string[] | ((index: number, value: string) => string) | undefined | Per-input CSS classes. Array maps index to class. Function receives (index, currentValue) and returns a class string |
| containerClass | string | '' | CSS class for the outer container div |
| ariaLabel | string | 'OTP Input' | Accessible label prefix. Each input gets "{ariaLabel} digit {n}" |

### Events

| Event | Payload | When |
|-------|---------|------|
| update:modelValue | string | Every character change (v-model) |
| change | string | Every character change |
| complete | string | All inputs are filled |

### Exposed Methods (via template ref)

```ts
const otpRef = ref<InstanceType<typeof OtpInput>>()
```

| Method | Signature | Description |
|--------|-----------|-------------|
| clear() | () => void | Clears all inputs, emits empty value, focuses first input |
| fill(value) | (value: string) => void | Fills inputs with given string. Filters invalid chars. Pads remaining with empty |
| focus() | () => void | Focuses the first input |
| focusInput(index) | (index: number) => void | Focuses a specific input by 0-based index |

### Slots

| Slot | Description |
|------|-------------|
| separator | Custom separator content. Only rendered when `separator` prop is set and between adjacent inputs. Overrides the default `<span v-html="separator">` |

## Composable: useOtp()

For building custom OTP UIs:

```ts
import { useOtp } from 'vue-otp-pro'

const {
  otp,           // Ref<string[]> — array of individual values
  activeInput,   // Ref<number> — currently focused index
  otpValue,      // ComputedRef<string> — joined string
  isComplete,    // ComputedRef<boolean> — all fields filled
  isValidChar,   // (char: string) => boolean
  setInputValue, // (index: number, value: string) => void
  clearAll,      // () => void
  fillAll,       // (value: string) => boolean
  syncLength,    // (newLength: number) => void
} = useOtp(
  () => 6,       // numInputs getter
  () => 'tel'    // inputType getter
)
```

## TypeScript Types

```ts
import type {
  OtpInputProps,   // All component props
  OtpInputExpose,  // Exposed methods interface
  OtpInputType,    // 'number' | 'tel' | 'letter-numeric' | 'password'
  OtpTheme,        // 'box' | 'underline' | ... | 'filled'
  OtpVariant,      // 'default' | 'primary' | 'success' | 'danger' | 'warning'
  OtpSize,         // 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg' | 'xl'
} from 'vue-otp-pro'
```

## CSS Custom Properties

Override on `.vop` to customize:

```css
.vop {
  --vop-font-family: 'SF Mono', monospace;
  --vop-gap: 10px;
  --vop-transition: 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1);
  --vop-border-color: #d1d5db;
  --vop-border-focus: #6366f1;
  --vop-bg: #ffffff;
  --vop-bg-focus: #ffffff;
  --vop-text: #1f2937;
  --vop-placeholder: #9ca3af;
  --vop-caret-color: #6366f1;
  --vop-shadow-focus: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99, 102, 241, 0.15);
}
```

Dark mode:

```css
.dark .vop {
  --vop-border-color: #374151;
  --vop-border-focus: #818cf8;
  --vop-bg: #1f2937;
  --vop-text: #f9fafb;
  --vop-placeholder: #6b7280;
}
```

## CSS Classes Applied by Component

| Class | Applied to | When |
|-------|-----------|------|
| .vop | Container | Always |
| .vop--{theme} | Container | Based on theme prop |
| .vop--{size} | Container | Based on size prop |
| .vop--{variant} | Container | Based on variant prop |
| .is-error | Container | error=true |
| .is-success | Container | success=true |
| .is-disabled | Container | disabled=true |
| .vop__input | Each input | Always |
| .is-filled | Each input | When input has a value |
| .is-readonly | Each input | When readonly=true |
| .just-filled | Each input | Briefly after a digit is entered (200ms pop animation) |
| .vop__separator | Separator span | When separator prop is set |

## Common Patterns

### Basic 6-digit OTP
```vue
<OtpInput v-model="otp" @complete="verify" />
```

### 4-digit PIN with password masking
```vue
<OtpInput v-model="pin" :num-inputs="4" input-type="password" />
```

### Themed with variant
```vue
<OtpInput theme="separated" variant="primary" size="lg" />
```

### Error handling with shake
```vue
<OtpInput v-model="otp" :error="hasError" @complete="verify" />
```

### With separator
```vue
<OtpInput :num-inputs="4" separator="-" />
```

### Programmatic control
```vue
<script setup>
const otpRef = ref()
otpRef.value?.fill('123456')
otpRef.value?.clear()
otpRef.value?.focus()
otpRef.value?.focusInput(2)
</script>
<template>
  <OtpInput ref="otpRef" />
</template>
```

### Per-input conditional styling
```vue
<OtpInput :conditional-class="(i, val) => val ? 'has-value' : 'empty'" />
```

### Verification form
```vue
<OtpInput
  v-model="otp"
  theme="separated"
  size="lg"
  :error="isError"
  :success="isSuccess"
  :disabled="isLoading"
  should-auto-focus
  @complete="handleVerify"
/>
```
